title: DHE Haryana UG College Admission 2026-27

detail.title: DHE Haryana UG College Admission 2026-27
detail.short_info: DHE Haryana UG College Admission 2026-27 is open. Check the complete schedule, online registration dates (7 May to 31 May 2026), merit list, counselling rounds and admission process for UG courses.

content.text: DHE Haryana UG College Admission 2026-27 has officially started. The Directorate of Higher Education Haryana (DHE Haryana) has opened the centralized online admission portal for Undergraduate (UG) courses for the academic session 2026-27. Online registration and application process is active from 07 May 2026 to 31 May 2026. This is a completely online and centralized admission process for admission in BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, BCA and other UG programmes in government and private colleges of Haryana.
Direct Fill Online Form DHE Haryana UG College Admission: Click Here

sections.heading: Overview of DHE Haryana UG College Admission 2026-27

rows: Directorate of Higher Education, Haryana (DHE Haryana)

sections.heading: What is DHE Haryana UG Admission?

content.text: DHE Haryana conducts centralized online admissions for all UG programmes in the state. The process is merit-based and follows NEP 2020 guidelines. It covers admissions to Government Colleges, Government Aided Colleges, and Self-Financing Colleges across Haryana.

sections.heading: DHE Haryana UG Admission 2026-27 Important Dates

rows: Online Registration of Applicants on Online Admission Portal
Editing of Application form by the Applicants (OTP based)
Display of List of all Applicants with objections /discrepancies, if any
Online Documents Verification by Colleges & removal of objections/discrepancies by Applicants, if any, through Student Login
Display of List of all eligible Applicants towards Merit Lists

sections.heading: Phase I: 1st Merit List (1st Round of Counselling Tentative)

rows: Fee Submission for 1st Round of Counselling

sections.heading: Phase II: 2nd Merit List (2nd Round of Counselling Tentative)

rows: Fee Submission for 2nd Round of Counselling

sections.heading: Phase III: Physical Counselling (3rd Round of Counselling Tentative)

rows: Re-opening of Online Admission Portal for Registration & Editing of Application Form by the Applicants
Continuation of Physical Counselling for leftover seats (with Late Fee of Rs. 100/-)
Continuation of Physical Counselling for leftover seats (with Late Fee of Rs. 100/- + Rs 100/- per day)

content.text: Note: The tentative dates may vary depending on the declaration of the Class 12 results.

items: Step 1 - Online Registration: OTP based Registration
Step 2 - Application Form: Filling up of Personal Details, Education Details, weightage, Document Upload, College and Course Preferences.
Step 3 - Online Verification: College verify the application form and documents of the candidates.
Step 4 - Merit List & Seat Allocation: Rank generation on the basis of Qualification Marks + Weightage.
Step 5 - Fee Payment: Candidates whose name appears in the Merit List, can pay the fee in online or offline mode within the scheduled time period.
Step 6 - Admission Confirmation: After Payment, download the Fee Receipt from the portal and your admission gets confirmed.

sections.heading: Documents Required for DHE Haryana UG Admission 2026-27

items: Class 10th and 12th Marksheets
Aadhaar Card
Passport Size Photograph & Signature
Caste Certificate (if applicable)
Income Certificate (for EWS)
Domicile Certificate of Haryana
Character Certificate from last attended school/college
